productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Jackets
description: Composition Black shawl collar jacket made of 60% cotton and 40% modal, and has full arm fitted sleeves Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery top up your favourite pair of slim Fit jeans and spaghetti strapped top with this shawl collar jacket from united colors of benetton. The fabric is sure to keep you comfortable all day, while the stylish collar allows you to cross over the front or simply let it hang on the sides to suit your mood. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
